subset_note: Initial frozen subset derived from warm-up pool themes; extend after review.

questions.text: Which papers develop or validate ReaxFF for solid ceramic electrolytes or NASICON-type materials?
Where does the KB document ReaxFF parameterization workflow and training data for battery-relevant electrolytes?
What work covers lithium carbonate electrolyte chemistry and Li0 vs Li+ behavior with ReaxFF?
Which sources discuss oxygen interactions with silica surfaces and ReaxFF extensions for SiO?
Nickel oxidation and oxygen diffusion with ReaxFF in metallic systems — which paper?
Graphene impact mechanics or nanocarbon mechanical behavior using ReaxFF in the corpus?
BaTiO3 ferroelectric switching and defects with ReaxFF — where is it covered?
Nickel catalyst surface chemistry with CHx and hydrogen formation using ReaxFF MD?
Large-scale coal or hydrocarbon pyrolysis with ReaxFF reactive MD?
ZIF or zeolitic imidazolate frameworks simulated with ReaxFF including glassy phases?
Machine-learned potentials or neural network force fields discussed in the wiki?
Overview of the ReaxFF family scope across the van Duin group corpus?
